questions: Tell us about a product you are proud of

roles.title: AI Orchaestrator
roles.description: This is a full-time on-site role located in the Greater Delhi Area for an AI Orchestrator. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying AI-powered systems tailored to PsyTech's mission-driven initiatives. Responsibilities include collaborating with product, engineering, and data science teams to integrate AI tools, evaluating emerging technologies, and ensuring scalable AI workflows. The AI Orchestrator will also focus on identifying new opportunities to apply AI across wellness, investing, and community-focused projects.
